pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 1.8 to 11 to align with the target JDK.
Add explicit JAXB runtime dependency because it was removed from the JDK standard library in Java 11.
Add explicit javax.annotation-api dependency because java.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5 to 2.3.7 to support Java 11 and modernize the framework stack.
Upgrade Hibernate from 4.3.6 to 5.4.25 to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Java 11 compatibility.
Upgrade Liquibase from 3.3.2 to 4.2.2 to ensure compatibility with newer Hibernate and Java versions.
Replace Joda-Time dependencies with Java 8+ java.time (JSR-310) support modules, as Joda-Time is deprecated.
Switch Jackson Hibernate module from version 4 to version 5 to match the upgraded Hibernate version.
Replace legacy Springfox Swagger 2 dependencies with Springfox OAS (OpenAPI 3) for modern API documentation.
Replace legacy commons-lang 2.6 with Apache Commons Lang 3 for modern utility methods.
Update MapStruct from 1.0.0.CR1 to 1.4.1.Final and switch to the standard mapstruct artifact.
Rename spring-boot-actuator to spring-boot-starter-actuator to follow Spring Boot 2.x starter naming conventions.
Switch from Hibernate Ehcache integration to Hibernate JCache (JSR-107) and add Ehcache implementation.
Import JHipster BOM to manage dependency versions consistently across the project.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with modern Spring Boot executable jar standards.
Upgrade various Maven plugins (compiler, surefire, failsafe, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 11 and Maven 3.3+.
Add Node.js and NPM version properties to manage frontend build tool versions.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new sample application identity.
Add Testcontainers MySQL dependency for integration testing with real database instances.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architectural unit testing.
Update SonarQube plugin version and configuration properties for modern code analysis.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove legacy metrics reporter dependency in favor of Micrometer.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern metrics collection.
Add Dropwizard Metrics core dependency required by Micrometer or other components.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architecture testing with JUnit 5.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web for standardized error handling.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security testing.
Add Spring Boot Test dependency explicitly.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine to enforce JUnit 5 native execution.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin with annotation processor paths for MapStruct, Hibernate, and JAXB.
Remove maven-processor-plugin as annotation processing is now handled by maven-compiler-plugin.
Update Liquibase plugin to use Hibernate 5 and updated dependencies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Changed liquibase-hibernate4 to liquibase-hibernate5 and updated dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JIB Maven plugin for container image building.
Add Checkstyle plugin for code style enforcement.
Add Javadoc plugin configuration.
Add Failsafe plugin for integration tests.
Add IDEA plugin configuration.
Add Resources plugin configuration for filtering YAML files.
Update JaCoCo plugin to support separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added pre/post integration test executions to jacoco-maven-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Enforcer plugin to require Java 8-15 and Maven version.
Remove SortPom plugin as it is no longer needed or compatible.
Remove Gatling Maven plugin.
Remove Eclipse plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-eclipse-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Enforcer plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-enforcer-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Surefire plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-surefire-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove WAR plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-war-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JaCoCo plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Sonar plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.codehaus.mojo:sonar-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Liquibase plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.liquibase:liquibase-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot Maven plugin configuration from main plugins section.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-maven-plugin from plugins, moved to pluginManagement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change pom.xml file mode from executable to regular file.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to manage integration tests.
Add sonar-maven-plugin for code quality analysis.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with repackage goal and main class.
Add profile to disable Liquibase database migrations.
Add profile to enable API documentation generation.
Add profile to enable TLS/SSL configuration.
Add profile to manage frontend build with Webpack.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to dev profile for Node/NPM installation and Webpack build.
Add spring-boot-devtools to dev profile for faster development cycle.
Add H2 in-memory database to dev profile.
Switch embedded server from Tomcat to Undertow in prod profile.
Remove yeoman-maven-plugin as frontend build is now handled by frontend-maven-plugin.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to prod profile for production Webpack build.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to generate build info with git details.
Add profile to build the application as a WAR file.
Add profile to configure IDE-specific dependencies like MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator.
Add profile to configure Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping and dependencies.
Add profile for end-to-end testing configuration.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to group file-specific overrides and update glob patterns for modern web development file types.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent settings into specific glob blocks like [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] and removed the generic [*] indent settings.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to handle line endings and binary detection for a wider variety of file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and extensive lists for text, binary, documents, and config files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Refactor .gitignore to use modern directory-only patterns and add new tool-specific ignore rules for VS Code, STS, and ESLint.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed patterns like /node_modules/** to node_modules/ and added sections for .vscode/, /.sts4-cache/, and .eslintcache.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration target.
Rename the application base name to reflect the new sample application identity.
Change the Java package name to the new namespace for the sample application.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for clusteredHttpSession.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for websocket.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for searchEngine.
Remove the deprecated frontendBuilder configuration as Grunt is no longer supported in newer JHipster versions.
Remove the explicit javaVersion configuration as it is no longer required or handled differently in JHipster 7.
Explicitly define the application type as monolith in the new configuration schema.
Specify the test frameworks to be used, including Gatling and Protractor.
Explicitly configure the server port in the new configuration schema.
Add configuration for social sign-in, disabled by default.
Regenerate the remember-me key for security purposes during the migration.
Enable Sass usage for frontend styling in the new configuration.
Define the JHipster prefix for CSS classes and other identifiers.
Add configuration for message broker, disabled by default.
Add configuration for service discovery, disabled by default.
Specify npm as the client package manager.
Specify Angular as the client framework.
Explicitly define the cache provider as ehcache.
Enable Hibernate cache in the new configuration schema.
Add configuration for reactive stack, disabled by default.
Add empty list for other modules in the new configuration schema.
Define the suffix for entity classes.
Define the suffix for DTO classes.
Specify no client theme in the new configuration.
Add empty list for blueprints in the new configuration schema.
Add configuration for embeddable launch script, disabled by default.
Record the creation timestamp of the application configuration.
Add configuration to skip user management, disabled by default.
Enable the admin UI in the new configuration.
Define the client theme variant as empty.
Add configuration to skip client generation, disabled by default.
Add configuration to skip server generation, disabled by default.
Add configuration to skip checking identifier length, disabled by default.
Add configuration to skip fake data generation, disabled by default.
Add empty list for pages in the new configuration schema.
Define the native language as English.
Define the supported languages as English and French.
List the entities included in the application.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the generic placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster documentation including development, testing, and Docker sections.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, and angularjs deps; added @angular/core, @angular/cli, and related packages.

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; added jest, protractor, and related type definitions.

package.json.general_idea: Replace JSHint with ESLint and Prettier for code formatting and linting.
package.json.human_impl: Removed jshint-stylish; added eslint, prettier, and related plugins.

package.json.general_idea: Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.
package.json.human_impl: Replaced "test": "grunt test" with comprehensive scripts using ng build, ng serve, and ./mvnw.

package.json.general_idea: Update package name, version, and description to reflect the new application identity.
Explicitly set the license field in package.json.
Add configuration fields for backend port, default environment, and packaging type.
Add configuration for Jest Sonar reporter to integrate with SonarQube.
Specify node_modules as a cache directory for npm.

src/main/resources/.h2.server.properties.general_idea: Rename the H2 database alias from 'JHipster H2 (Embedded)' to 'JHipster H2 (Memory)' to reflect the in-memory nature of the database.
Update the H2 in-memory database name to match the specific application identifier 'jhipsternoi18nsampleapplication'.
Append the application name suffix to the H2 JDBC URL configuration.
Enable remote access to the H2 web console by setting webAllowOthers to true.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the old ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner including ANSI color codes.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with JHipster's standard block-based banner using ${AnsiColor.GREEN} and ${AnsiColor.RED} variables.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP and standard JDBC URL format instead of the legacy Tomcat JDBC pool properties.
Refactor JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x naming conventions and remove deprecated settings like EJB3NamingStrategy.
Move Liquibase configuration under the spring.liquibase namespace to match Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration requirements.
Replace legacy cache properties with JHipster-specific cache configuration under the jhipster.cache namespace.
Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) which is no longer supported or configured in this manner in newer Spring Boot versions.
Introduce JHipster-specific application properties for security, CORS, and logging to support the updated framework features.
Configure Spring Boot DevTools for development profile to enable restart and livereload features.
Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and application packages in the dev profile.
Add standard Spring Boot mail properties for the development environment.
Update Thymeleaf configuration to disable caching and remove deprecated mode settings.
Update message cache duration to use ISO 8601 duration format instead of seconds.
Explicitly disable the H2 console in the dev profile configuration.
Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles list to enable API documentation generation.
Configure Jackson to indent output for better readability in the development environment.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver properties to HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.human_impl: Changed `dataSourceClassName` to `type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource` and moved connection params to `url`.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove explicit Hibernate dialect and database type settings in favor of auto-detection or newer defaults.
Migrate cache configuration from root-level properties to JHipster-specific `jhipster.cache` namespace.
Replace legacy metrics exporters (Spark, Graphite) with Spring Boot Actuator management metrics.
Standardize logging levels using Spring Boot's `logging.level` hierarchy.
Introduce JHipster-specific configuration properties for security, mail, and logging.
Add modern server features like graceful shutdown and compression to the server configuration.
Move Liquibase context configuration under the Spring namespace.
Move mail server configuration under the Spring namespace.
Move Thymeleaf configuration under the Spring namespace.
Explicitly disable devtools in production profile.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x actuator properties with Spring Boot 2.x management endpoint configuration.
Update async task configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x 'spring.task' namespace instead of custom 'async' properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Moved 'async.corePoolSize' etc. to 'spring.task.execution.pool.core-size' and added 'spring.task.scheduling' configuration.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Relocate mail configuration from custom 'mail' namespace to standard Spring Boot 'spring.mail' properties.
Update JPA and Hibernate properties to align with Spring Boot 2.x and Hibernate 5.3+ defaults.
Update Swagger documentation properties to match JHipster 6.x structure and naming conventions.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: Renamed 'swagger.title' to 'jhipster.api-docs.title' and updated contact/license fields to new keys.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Enable Micrometer metrics export to Prometheus and configure health probes for Kubernetes readiness/liveness.
Enforce HTTP-only cookies for server sessions to improve security posture.
